82/* Ensure variable pad macros are available before any use (histogram header, etc.) */
83#ifndef MASS_MAPS_VARPAD_FACTOR
84#define MASS_MAPS_VARPAD_FACTOR 20.0
85#endif
86#ifndef MASS_MAPS_VARPAD_WARN_FRAC

101/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
102/* Optional displacement histogram (compile-time, default OFF) */
103/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
104#ifdef DISP_HISTOGRAM
105#ifndef DISP_HIST_NBINS
106#define DISP_HIST_NBINS 100
107#endif
108#ifndef DISP_HIST_DMIN
109#define DISP_HIST_DMIN 0.0
110#endif
111#ifndef DISP_HIST_DMAX
112#define DISP_HIST_DMAX 100.0
113#endif
114#ifndef DISP_HIST_STRIDE
115#define DISP_HIST_STRIDE 1
116#endif
117#ifndef DISP_HIST_AT_PREV
118#define DISP_HIST_AT_PREV 1
119#endif
120#ifndef DISP_HIST_AT_CURR
121#define DISP_HIST_AT_CURR 1
122#endif
154static void mass_maps_disp_hist_write_file(double z_target,
155 const unsigned long long *hist_global,
156 unsigned long long underflow_global,
157 unsigned long long overflow_global,
158 unsigned long long sampled_global)
159{
160 /* Only root performs I/O; other ranks return immediately */
161 if (ThisTask != 0)
162 return;
163 /* Build filename: pinocchio.<z>.<RunFlag>.disp_hist.out with fixed-width z */
164 char fname[4 * LBLENGTH];
165 snprintf(fname, sizeof(fname), "pinocchio.%.4f.%s.disp_hist.out", z_target, params.RunFlag);
166 FILE *fd = fopen(fname, "w");
167 if (!fd)
168 {
169 fprintf(stderr, "Task 0 ERROR: cannot open %s for writing.\n", fname);
170 return;
171 }
172 double dmin = (double)DISP_HIST_DMIN;
173 double dmax = (double)DISP_HIST_DMAX;
174 int nb = (int)DISP_HIST_NBINS;
175 int stride = (int)DISP_HIST_STRIDE;
176 /* Compute variable buffer pad at this redshift for header context */
177 double sigma8 = params.Sigma8;
178 double factor = MASS_MAPS_VARPAD_FACTOR;
179 double res = params.InterPartDist; /* true Mpc */
180 double h = params.Hubble100;
181 double pad_phys_h = factor * pow(sigma8 / 0.8, 1.5) / (1.0 + z_target); /* Mpc/h */
182 double pad_phys = (h > 0.0) ? (pad_phys_h / h) : pad_phys_h; /* true Mpc */
183 double pad_cells = (res > 0.0) ? (pad_phys / res) : 0.0; /* dimensionless */
184 /* Header with provenance and units */
185 fprintf(fd, "# Displacement histogram |x(q,z)-q| in InterPartDist units\n");
186 fprintf(fd, "# z=%.8f NBINS=%d DMIN=%.6g DMAX=%.6g SPACING=linear STRIDE=%d\n", z_target, nb, dmin, dmax, stride);
187 fprintf(fd, "# GRID=(%d,%d,%d) InterPartDist(Mpc)=%.9g LPT_ORDER=%d MPI_TASKS=%d RUN=%s\n",
188 (int)MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_], (int)MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_], (int)MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_],
189 params.InterPartDist,
190#ifdef THREE_LPT
191 3,
192#else
193#ifdef TWO_LPT
194 2,
195#else
196 1,
197#endif
198#endif
199 NTasks, params.RunFlag);
200 fprintf(fd, "# VARPAD: FACTOR=%.6g SIGMA8=%.6g PAD_PHYS(Mpc)=%.9g PAD_PHYS(Mpc/h)=%.9g PAD_CELLS=%.9g\n",
201 factor, sigma8, pad_phys, pad_phys_h, pad_cells);
202 fprintf(fd, "# SAMPLED_GLOBAL=%llu UNDERFLOW=%llu OVERFLOW=%llu\n",
203 (unsigned long long)sampled_global,
204 (unsigned long long)underflow_global,
205 (unsigned long long)overflow_global);
206 fprintf(fd, "# Columns: bin_lo bin_hi count fraction cum_fraction\n");
207 /* Emit rows */
208 double width = (nb > 0) ? ((dmax - dmin) / (double)nb) : 0.0;
209 unsigned long long cum = 0ULL;
210 for (int b = 0; b < nb; ++b)
211 {
212 double blo = dmin + width * (double)b;
213 double bhi = blo + width;
214 unsigned long long c = hist_global[b];
215 cum += c;
216 double frac = (sampled_global > 0ULL) ? ((double)c / (double)sampled_global) : 0.0;
217 double cfrac = (sampled_global > 0ULL) ? ((double)cum / (double)sampled_global) : 0.0;
218 fprintf(fd, "%.9g %.9g %llu %.9g %.9g\n", blo, bhi, (unsigned long long)c, frac, cfrac);
219 }
220 fclose(fd);
221 if (internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)
222 {
223 printf("[%s] DISP_HIST: wrote %s (z=%.6f nbins=%d sampled=%llu uf=%llu of=%llu)\n",
224 fdate(), fname, z_target, nb,
225 (unsigned long long)sampled_global,
226 (unsigned long long)underflow_global,
227 (unsigned long long)overflow_global);
228 }
229}
230
258static void mass_maps_disp_hist_accumulate_endpoint(int use_curr,
259 unsigned long long *hist_local,
260 unsigned long long *underflow_local,
261 unsigned long long *overflow_local,
262 unsigned long long *sampled_local)
263{
264 const int nb = (int)DISP_HIST_NBINS;
265 const double dmin = (double)DISP_HIST_DMIN;
266 const double dmax = (double)DISP_HIST_DMAX;
267 const int stride = (int)DISP_HIST_STRIDE;
268 if (nb <= 0 || dmax <= dmin)
269 return;
270 int nx = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_x_];
271 int ny = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_];
272 int nz = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_];
273 int gx0 = (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_x_];
274 int gy0 = (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_y_];
275 int gz0 = (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_z_];
276 double invw = (double)nb / (dmax - dmin);
277
278 unsigned long long uf = 0ULL, of = 0ULL, tot = 0ULL;
279
280#ifdef _OPENMP
281 int nthreads = omp_get_max_threads();
282#else
283 int nthreads = 1;
284#endif
285 unsigned long long *thread_hist = (unsigned long long *)calloc((size_t)nthreads * (size_t)nb, sizeof(unsigned long long));
286 if (!thread_hist)
287 return;
288
289 /* Parallel over local tile */
290#ifdef _OPENMP
291#pragma omp parallel
292#endif
293 {
294#ifdef _OPENMP
295 int tid = omp_get_thread_num();
296#else
297 int tid = 0;
298#endif
299 unsigned long long *h = thread_hist + (size_t)tid * (size_t)nb;
300
301#ifdef _OPENMP
302#pragma omp for collapse(3) schedule(static) reduction(+ : uf, of, tot)
303#endif
304 for (int li = 0; li < nx; ++li)
305 for (int lj = 0; lj < ny; ++lj)
306 for (int lk = 0; lk < nz; ++lk)
307 {
308 if (stride > 1)
309 {
310 int gi = gx0 + li, gj = gy0 + lj, gk = gz0 + lk;
311 /* Simple deterministic sub-sampling */
312 if (((gi + gj + gk) % stride) != 0)
313 continue;
314 }
315 unsigned int idx = COORD_TO_INDEX(li, lj, lk, MyGrids[0].GSlocal);
316 /* Build displacement vector in grid units (InterPartDist units) */
317 double vx = 0.0, vy = 0.0, vz = 0.0;
318 if (use_curr)
319 {
320 vx = products[idx].Vel[0];
321 vy = products[idx].Vel[1];
322 vz = products[idx].Vel[2];
323#ifdef TWO_LPT
324 vx += products[idx].Vel_2LPT[0];
325 vy += products[idx].Vel_2LPT[1];
326 vz += products[idx].Vel_2LPT[2];
327#ifdef THREE_LPT
328 vx += products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1[0] + products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2[0];
329 vy += products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1[1] + products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2[1];
330 vz += products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1[2] + products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2[2];
331#endif
332#endif
333 }
334 else
335 {
336 vx = products[idx].Vel_prev[0];
337 vy = products[idx].Vel_prev[1];
338 vz = products[idx].Vel_prev[2];
339#ifdef TWO_LPT
340 vx += products[idx].Vel_2LPT_prev[0];
341 vy += products[idx].Vel_2LPT_prev[1];
342 vz += products[idx].Vel_2LPT_prev[2];
343#ifdef THREE_LPT
344 vx += products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[0] + products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[0];
345 vy += products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[1] + products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[1];
346 vz += products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[2] + products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[2];
347#endif
348#endif
349 }
350 double d = sqrt(vx * vx + vy * vy + vz * vz); /* in InterPartDist units */
351 ++tot;
352 if (d < dmin)
353 {
354 ++uf;
355 continue;
356 }
357 if (!(d < dmax))
358 {
359 ++of;
360 continue;
361 }
362 int bin = (int)floor((d - dmin) * invw);
363 if (bin < 0)
364 bin = 0;
365 if (bin >= nb)
366 bin = nb - 1;
367 h[bin]++;
368 }
369 }
370
371 /* Reduce thread hist to task hist */
372 for (int t = 0; t < nthreads; ++t)
373 {
374 unsigned long long *h = thread_hist + (size_t)t * (size_t)nb;
375 for (int b = 0; b < nb; ++b)
376 hist_local[b] += h[b];
377 }
378 free(thread_hist);
379 *underflow_local += uf;
380 *overflow_local += of;
381 *sampled_local += tot;
382}
383
412static void mass_maps_disp_hist_on_segment(int segment_index, double z_prev, double z_curr)
413{
414 (void)segment_index;
415 const int nb = (int)DISP_HIST_NBINS;
416 if (nb <= 0 || DISP_HIST_DMAX <= DISP_HIST_DMIN)
417 return;
418
419 /* Allocate task-local buffers (conditional on compile-time toggles) */
420 unsigned long long *hist_prev_local = NULL, *hist_curr_local = NULL;
421 unsigned long long uf_prev_local = 0ULL, of_prev_local = 0ULL, tot_prev_local = 0ULL;
422 unsigned long long uf_curr_local = 0ULL, of_curr_local = 0ULL, tot_curr_local = 0ULL;
423
424 if (DISP_HIST_AT_PREV)
425 hist_prev_local = (unsigned long long *)calloc((size_t)nb, sizeof(unsigned long long));
426 if (DISP_HIST_AT_CURR)
427 hist_curr_local = (unsigned long long *)calloc((size_t)nb, sizeof(unsigned long long));
428
429 if (hist_prev_local)
430 mass_maps_disp_hist_accumulate_endpoint(0, hist_prev_local, &uf_prev_local, &of_prev_local, &tot_prev_local);
431 if (hist_curr_local)
432 mass_maps_disp_hist_accumulate_endpoint(1, hist_curr_local, &uf_curr_local, &of_curr_local, &tot_curr_local);
433
434 /* Global reductions (MPI) and writes on rank 0 */
435 if (hist_prev_local)
436 {
437 unsigned long long *hist_prev_global = NULL;
438 if (!ThisTask)
439 hist_prev_global = (unsigned long long *)calloc((size_t)nb, sizeof(unsigned long long));
440 MPI_Reduce(hist_prev_local, (!ThisTask ? hist_prev_global : NULL), nb, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
441 unsigned long long uf_prev_global = 0ULL, of_prev_global = 0ULL, tot_prev_global = 0ULL;
442 MPI_Reduce(&uf_prev_local, &uf_prev_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
443 MPI_Reduce(&of_prev_local, &of_prev_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
444 MPI_Reduce(&tot_prev_local, &tot_prev_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
445 mass_maps_disp_hist_write_file(z_prev, hist_prev_global, uf_prev_global, of_prev_global, tot_prev_global);
446 if (!ThisTask && hist_prev_global)
447 free(hist_prev_global);
448 }
449 if (hist_curr_local)
450 {
451 unsigned long long *hist_curr_global = NULL;
452 if (!ThisTask)
453 hist_curr_global = (unsigned long long *)calloc((size_t)nb, sizeof(unsigned long long));
454 MPI_Reduce(hist_curr_local, (!ThisTask ? hist_curr_global : NULL), nb, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
455 unsigned long long uf_curr_global = 0ULL, of_curr_global = 0ULL, tot_curr_global = 0ULL;
456 MPI_Reduce(&uf_curr_local, &uf_curr_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
457 MPI_Reduce(&of_curr_local, &of_curr_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
458 MPI_Reduce(&tot_curr_local, &tot_curr_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
459 mass_maps_disp_hist_write_file(z_curr, hist_curr_global, uf_curr_global, of_curr_global, tot_curr_global);
460 if (!ThisTask && hist_curr_global)
461 free(hist_curr_global);
462 }
463 if (hist_prev_local)
464 free(hist_prev_local);
465 if (hist_curr_local)
466 free(hist_curr_local);
467}
468#endif /* DISP_HISTOGRAM */
469
470/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
471/* Optional: carry ZPLC>ZACC filter diagnostics into FITS */
472/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
473typedef struct
474{
475 /* Totals */
476 long long considered;
477 long long excluded;
478 long long included;
479 double frac_excluded;
480 /* Ranges and consistency */
481 double zplc_min, zplc_max;
482 double zacc_min, zacc_max;
483 long long zplc_out_of_segment;
484 /* Segment id for context */
485 int segment_index;
486 /* Flag */
487 int present;
488} MassMapsFilterDiag;
489
490static MassMapsFilterDiag g_massmaps_filter_diag = {0};
491
523static void mass_maps_write_filter_keywords(fitsfile *fptr, int segment_index)
524{
525#ifdef MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED
526 /* Basic guards: null file, no diagnostics, or mismatched segment */
527 if (!fptr)
528 return;
529 if (!g_massmaps_filter_diag.present)
530 return;
531 if (g_massmaps_filter_diag.segment_index != segment_index)
532 {
533 /* Stale or mismatched diagnostics; skip to avoid wrong metadata */
534 return;
535 }
536 int status = 0;
537 {
538 char filter_desc[] = "ZPLC>ZACC";
539 fits_update_key(fptr, TSTRING, "FILTER", filter_desc, "Mass-maps inclusion filter", &status);
540 }
541 {
542 long long considered = g_massmaps_filter_diag.considered;
543 long long excluded = g_massmaps_filter_diag.excluded;
544 long long included = g_massmaps_filter_diag.included;
545 double frac_ex = g_massmaps_filter_diag.frac_excluded;
546 fits_update_key(fptr, TLONGLONG, "ZF_CONS", &considered, "Entries considered by filter", &status);
547 fits_update_key(fptr, TLONGLONG, "ZF_EXCL", &excluded, "Entries excluded by filter", &status);
548 fits_update_key(fptr, TLONGLONG, "ZF_INCL", &included, "Entries included after filter", &status);
549 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "ZF_FEXCL", &frac_ex, "Excluded fraction (0..1)", &status);
550 }
551 {
552 double zplc_min = g_massmaps_filter_diag.zplc_min;
553 double zplc_max = g_massmaps_filter_diag.zplc_max;
554 double zacc_min = g_massmaps_filter_diag.zacc_min;
555 double zacc_max = g_massmaps_filter_diag.zacc_max;
556 long long outseg = g_massmaps_filter_diag.zplc_out_of_segment;
557 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "ZPLC_MIN", &zplc_min, "Min PLC redshift encountered", &status);
558 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "ZPLC_MAX", &zplc_max, "Max PLC redshift encountered", &status);
559 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "ZACC_MIN", &zacc_min, "Min collapse redshift (ZACC)", &status);
560 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "ZACC_MAX", &zacc_max, "Max collapse redshift (ZACC)", &status);
561 fits_update_key(fptr, TLONGLONG, "ZPLC_OOS", &outseg, "Count of z_plc outside segment bounds (tolerance)", &status);
562 }
563 {
564 /* Add concise HISTORY lines */
565 char hist[128];
566 snprintf(hist, sizeof(hist), "FILTER: seg=%d ZPLC>ZACC considered=%lld excluded=%lld included=%lld",
567 segment_index,
568 (long long)g_massmaps_filter_diag.considered,
569 (long long)g_massmaps_filter_diag.excluded,
570 (long long)g_massmaps_filter_diag.included);
571 fits_write_history(fptr, hist, &status);
572 }
573 if (status)
574 {
575 /* Non-fatal: report but continue */
576 fits_report_error(stderr, status);
577 }
578#else
579 (void)fptr;
580 (void)segment_index;
581#endif
582}

584#ifdef SNAPSHOT
585/* Forward declaration: back-distribute ZACC (and group_ID) from fragment sub-boxes to products FFT tiles */
586int distribute_back(void);
587#endif
588
589/* Optional matching diagnostics: relate excluded entries to PLC halo catalog */
590#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
591static int mass_maps_matchdiag_inited = 0;
592static unsigned long long *mass_maps_plc_names = NULL;
593static int mass_maps_plc_n = 0;
594
609static int cmp_ull(const void *a, const void *b)
610{
611 unsigned long long aa = *(const unsigned long long *)a;
612 unsigned long long bb = *(const unsigned long long *)b;
613 return (aa < bb) ? -1 : (aa > bb) ? 1
614 : 0;
615}
616
631static void mass_maps_matchdiag_init(void)
632{
633 if (mass_maps_matchdiag_inited)
634 return;
635 /* Build a sorted list of PLC group names for fast membership testing */
636 if (plc.Nstored > 0 && plcgroups)
637 {
638 mass_maps_plc_n = plc.Nstored;
639 mass_maps_plc_names = (unsigned long long *)malloc(sizeof(unsigned long long) * (size_t)mass_maps_plc_n);
640 if (mass_maps_plc_names)
641 {
642 for (int i = 0; i < mass_maps_plc_n; ++i)
643 mass_maps_plc_names[i] = plcgroups[i].name;
644 qsort(mass_maps_plc_names, (size_t)mass_maps_plc_n, sizeof(unsigned long long), cmp_ull);
645 }
646 }
647 mass_maps_matchdiag_inited = 1;
648}
649
664static inline int mass_maps_group_in_plc_by_id(int gid)
665{
666 if (gid <= 0)
667 return 0;
668 if (!mass_maps_matchdiag_inited)
669 mass_maps_matchdiag_init();
670 if (!mass_maps_plc_names || mass_maps_plc_n <= 0)
671 return 0;
672 /* Lookup by unique group name */
673 unsigned long long key = groups[gid].name;
674 return bsearch(&key, mass_maps_plc_names, (size_t)mass_maps_plc_n, sizeof(unsigned long long), cmp_ull) != NULL;
675}
676#endif /* MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG */
677
678/* Local constants */
679#ifndef MASS_MAPS_Z_EPS
680#define MASS_MAPS_Z_EPS 1e-8
681#endif
682/* Crossing epsilon for alpha denominator */
683#ifndef MASS_MAPS_F_EPS
684#define MASS_MAPS_F_EPS 1e-7
685#endif
686/* Culling defaults */
687#ifndef MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS
688#define MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS 8
689#endif
690/* Default per-axis block counts fall back to MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS if not provided */
691#ifndef MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_X
692#define MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_X MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS
693#endif
694#ifndef MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_Y
695#define MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_Y MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS
696#endif
697#ifndef MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_Z
698#define MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_Z MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS
699#endif
700
701/* Forward decls for helpers provided elsewhere */
702void set_weight(pos_data *);
703
704/* Global sheet array */
705MassSheet *MassSheets = NULL;
706int NMassSheets = 0;
707double *MassMapBoundaryZ = NULL;
708double *MassMapBoundaryChi = NULL;
709double *MassMapBoundaryDA = NULL;
710/* HEALPix maps: one map per mass sheet (segment). */
711static int MassMapNSIDE_current = 0;
712static long MassMapNPIX = 0;
713static double *MassMapSegmentMaps = NULL; /* length = NMassSheets * MassMapNPIX */
714static double *MassMapReduceBuffer = NULL; /* root-only temporary buffer for reductions */
715/* Per-segment replication candidate list (radial overlap with segment chi span) */
716static int *MassMapSegmentReplications = NULL;
717static int MassMapSegmentReplicationCount = 0;
718static int MassMapSegmentReplicationsCapacity = 0;
719
720/* Cached PLC center (phys) and sky basis (e1,e2,e3) for pixelization */
721static double MassMapPLC_CenterPhys[3] = {0.0, 0.0, 0.0};
722static double MassMapPLC_e1[3] = {1.0, 0.0, 0.0};
723static double MassMapPLC_e2[3] = {0.0, 1.0, 0.0};
724static double MassMapPLC_e3[3] = {0.0, 0.0, 1.0};
725static int MassMapPLC_BasisReady = 0;
726/* Cache of cap size for current NSIDE (when using partial-sky) */
727static long MassMapNCAP = 0;
728
729/* Optional: keep full-sky output (IMAGE HDU) even if aperture < 180 */
730#ifndef MASS_MAPS_FULLSKY_OUTPUT
731/* Undefine or set to 0 to use compact partial-sky by default */
732#define MASS_MAPS_FULLSKY_OUTPUT 0
733#endif
734
754static inline void mass_maps_cache_plc_basis_and_center(void)
755{
756 if (MassMapPLC_BasisReady)
757 return;
758 MassMapPLC_CenterPhys[0] = plc.center[0] * params.InterPartDist;
759 MassMapPLC_CenterPhys[1] = plc.center[1] * params.InterPartDist;
760 MassMapPLC_CenterPhys[2] = plc.center[2] * params.InterPartDist;
761 /* Use PLC basis computed at initialization (orthonormal and unit) */
762 MassMapPLC_e1[0] = plc.xvers[0];
763 MassMapPLC_e1[1] = plc.xvers[1];
764 MassMapPLC_e1[2] = plc.xvers[2];
765 MassMapPLC_e2[0] = plc.yvers[0];
766 MassMapPLC_e2[1] = plc.yvers[1];
767 MassMapPLC_e2[2] = plc.yvers[2];
768 MassMapPLC_e3[0] = plc.zvers[0];
769 MassMapPLC_e3[1] = plc.zvers[1];
770 MassMapPLC_e3[2] = plc.zvers[2];
771 MassMapPLC_BasisReady = 1;
772}
773
794static inline int mass_maps_entry_inside_aperture(const double pos[3])
795{
796 mass_maps_cache_plc_basis_and_center();
797 double vx = pos[0] - MassMapPLC_CenterPhys[0];
798 double vy = pos[1] - MassMapPLC_CenterPhys[1];
799 double vz = pos[2] - MassMapPLC_CenterPhys[2];
800 double vnorm = sqrt(vx * vx + vy * vy + vz * vz);
801 if (vnorm == 0.0)
802 return 0;
803 double invv = 1.0 / vnorm;
804 double vhat_z = (vx * MassMapPLC_e3[0] + vy * MassMapPLC_e3[1] + vz * MassMapPLC_e3[2]) * invv;
805 if (vhat_z > 1.0)
806 vhat_z = 1.0;
807 else if (vhat_z < -1.0)
808 vhat_z = -1.0;
809 double angle = acos(vhat_z) * (180.0 / acos(-1.0));
810 double A = params.PLCAperture;
811 return angle <= A;
812}
813
829int mass_maps_init_sheets(void)
830{
831 /* Preconditions: outputs.z[] filled, descending order, outputs.n >= 2 */
832 if (outputs.n < 2)
833 {
834 if (!ThisTask)
835 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS ERROR: Need at least 2 output redshifts (found %d) to define mass sheets.\n", outputs.n);
836 return 1;
837 }
838
839 /* Ensure coverage matches PLC redshift range: first output == StartingzForPLC, last output == LastzForPLC */
840 {
841 double z_first = outputs.z[0];
842 double z_last = outputs.z[outputs.n - 1];
843 if (fabs(z_first - params.StartingzForPLC) > MASS_MAPS_Z_EPS)
844 {
845 if (!ThisTask)
846 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS ERROR: First output redshift %g does not match StartingzForPLC=%g (|Δ|=%g > %g).\n",
847 z_first, params.StartingzForPLC, fabs(z_first - params.StartingzForPLC), MASS_MAPS_Z_EPS);
848 return 1;
849 }
850 if (fabs(z_last - params.LastzForPLC) > MASS_MAPS_Z_EPS)
851 {
852 if (!ThisTask)
853 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS ERROR: Last output redshift %g does not match LastzForPLC=%g (|Δ|=%g > %g).\n",
854 z_last, params.LastzForPLC, fabs(z_last - params.LastzForPLC), MASS_MAPS_Z_EPS);
855 return 1;
856 }
857 }
858
859 /* Verify strictly descending and no duplicates within eps */
860 for (int i = 0; i < outputs.n - 1; ++i)
861 {
862 double z_hi = outputs.z[i];
863 double z_lo = outputs.z[i + 1];
864 if (!(z_hi > z_lo))
865 {
866 if (!ThisTask)
867 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS ERROR: Output redshifts must be in strictly descending order (z[%d]=%g, z[%d]=%g).\n", i, z_hi, i + 1, z_lo);
868 return 1;
869 }
870 if (fabs(z_hi - z_lo) < MASS_MAPS_Z_EPS)
871 {
872 if (!ThisTask)
873 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS ERROR: Adjacent output redshifts too close (|%g-%g| < %g).\n", z_hi, z_lo, MASS_MAPS_Z_EPS);
874 return 1;
875 }
876 }
877 /*
878 * Number of mass sheets equals the number of adjacent redshift pairs
879 * in the output list: sheets s = 0..(n-2) are bounded by z[s] and z[s+1].
880 * We therefore allocate:
881 * - MassSheets: one entry per sheet (outputs.n - 1)
882 * - Boundary arrays (Z/Chi/DA): one value per boundary, length outputs.n
883 * (there are outputs.n boundaries for outputs.n-1 sheets).
884 */
885 NMassSheets = outputs.n - 1;
886 MassSheets = (MassSheet *)malloc(sizeof(MassSheet) * NMassSheets);
887 MassMapBoundaryZ = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * outputs.n);
888 MassMapBoundaryChi = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * outputs.n);
889 MassMapBoundaryDA = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * outputs.n);
890 if (!MassSheets)
891 {
892 if (!ThisTask)
893 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS ERROR: Cannot allocate MassSheets (%d entries).\n", NMassSheets);
894 return 1;
895 }
896 if (!MassMapBoundaryZ || !MassMapBoundaryChi || !MassMapBoundaryDA)
897 {
898 if (!ThisTask)
899 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS ERROR: Cannot allocate boundary arrays (n=%d).\n", outputs.n);
900 return 1;
901 }
902
903 /* Fill boundary arrays */
904 for (int k = 0; k < outputs.n; ++k)
905 {
906 double z = outputs.z[k];
907 MassMapBoundaryZ[k] = z;
908 MassMapBoundaryChi[k] = ComovingDistance(z);
909 MassMapBoundaryDA[k] = DiameterDistance(z);
910 }
911
912 /*
913 * For each mass sheet s (bounded by output boundaries s and s+1),
914 * cache the upper/lower redshift (z), comoving distance (chi), and
915 * angular-diameter distance (da). Compute the spans Δz and Δχ, check
916 * that Δχ>0 (monotonic chi with descending z), store its inverse, and
917 * precompute χ_hi^3 − χ_lo^3 (useful for volume-weighted quantities).
918 */
919 for (int s = 0; s < NMassSheets; ++s)
920 {
921 MassSheet *ms = &MassSheets[s];
922 ms->z_hi = MassMapBoundaryZ[s];
923 ms->z_lo = MassMapBoundaryZ[s + 1];
924 ms->delta_z = ms->z_hi - ms->z_lo;
925 ms->chi_hi = MassMapBoundaryChi[s];
926 ms->chi_lo = MassMapBoundaryChi[s + 1];
927 ms->delta_chi = ms->chi_hi - ms->chi_lo;
928 if (!(ms->delta_chi > 0.0))
929 {
930 if (!ThisTask)
931 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS ERROR: Non-positive comoving distance span for sheet %d (chi_hi=%g chi_lo=%g).\n", s, ms->chi_hi, ms->chi_lo);
932 return 1;
933 }
934 ms->inv_dchi = 1.0 / ms->delta_chi;
935 ms->da_hi = MassMapBoundaryDA[s];
936 ms->da_lo = MassMapBoundaryDA[s + 1];
937 double chi_hi3 = ms->chi_hi * ms->chi_hi * ms->chi_hi;
938 double chi_lo3 = ms->chi_lo * ms->chi_lo * ms->chi_lo;
939 ms->chi3_diff = chi_hi3 - chi_lo3;
940 }
941
942 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)
943 {
944 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS: initialized %d mass sheets\n", fdate(), NMassSheets);
945 for (int s = 0; s < NMassSheets; ++s)
946 {
947 MassSheet *ms = &MassSheets[s];
948 printf(" sheet %3d: z_hi=%8.4f z_lo=%8.4f Δz=%8.4f chi_hi=%10.4f chi_lo=%10.4f Δchi=%10.4f\n", s, ms->z_hi, ms->z_lo, ms->delta_z, ms->chi_hi, ms->chi_lo, ms->delta_chi);
949 }
950 }
951
952 return 0;
953}
954
960void mass_maps_free_sheets(void)
961{
962 if (MassSheets)
963 free(MassSheets);
964 MassSheets = NULL;
965 NMassSheets = 0;
966 if (MassMapBoundaryZ)
967 free(MassMapBoundaryZ);
968 if (MassMapBoundaryChi)
969 free(MassMapBoundaryChi);
970 if (MassMapBoundaryDA)
971 free(MassMapBoundaryDA);
972 MassMapBoundaryZ = MassMapBoundaryChi = MassMapBoundaryDA = NULL;
973}
974
975/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
976/* HEALPix map allocation (one map per mass sheet) */
977/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
978
994static inline long mass_maps_npix_from_nside(int nside)
995{
996 return 12L * (long)nside * (long)nside;
997}
998
1025static long mass_maps_ncap_from_aperture(int nside, double aperture_deg)
1026{
1027 if (nside <= 0)
1028 return 0;
1029 long npix_full = mass_maps_npix_from_nside(nside);
1030 /* Clamp aperture to [0,180] */
1031 if (aperture_deg <= 0.0)
1032 return 0;
1033 if (aperture_deg >= 180.0)
1034 return npix_full;
1035 double pi = acos(-1.0);
1036 double theta_cap = aperture_deg * (pi / 180.0);
1037 double z0 = cos(theta_cap); /* include rings with z >= z0 */
1038
1039 long ncap = 0;
1040 int N = nside;
1041
1042 /* North polar rings: i = 1..N-1, z_i = 1 - i^2/(3 N^2), npix_i = 4 i */
1043 double tmp = 3.0 * (double)N * (double)N * (1.0 - z0);
1044 long ipolar_max = (long)floor(sqrt(fmax(0.0, tmp)) + 1e-12);
1045 if (ipolar_max > (long)N - 1)
1046 ipolar_max = (long)N - 1;
1047 if (ipolar_max > 0)
1048 {
1049 /* sum_{i=1}^{ipolar_max} 4 i = 2 * ipolar_max * (ipolar_max + 1) */
1050 ncap += 2L * ipolar_max * (ipolar_max + 1L);
1051 }
1052
1053 /* Equatorial rings: i = N..3N, z_i = (4N - 2i)/(3N), npix_i = 4N */
1054 double i2max_d = ((4.0 * N) - 3.0 * N * z0) / 2.0;
1055 long i2_max = (long)floor(i2max_d + 1e-12);
1056 if (i2_max > 3L * N)
1057 i2_max = 3L * N;
1058 if (i2_max >= (long)N)
1059 {
1060 long neq_rings = i2_max - (long)N + 1L;
1061 if (neq_rings > 0)
1062 ncap += (long)(4L * (long)N) * neq_rings;
1063 }
1064
1065 /* South polar rings: i = 3N+1..4N-1, z_i = -1 + m^2/(3N^2), where m = 4N - i, npix_i = 4 m */
1066 if (i2_max >= 3L * N)
1067 {
1068 /* Only if cap extends beyond equatorial band */
1069 double tmp_s = 3.0 * (double)N * (double)N * (1.0 + z0);
1070 long m_min = (long)ceil(sqrt(fmax(0.0, tmp_s)) - 1e-12);
1071 if (m_min < 1)
1072 m_min = 1;
1073 if (m_min <= (long)N - 1)
1074 {
1075 long m_max = (long)N - 1;
1076 long count = m_max - m_min + 1L;
1077 /* sum_{m=m_min}^{m_max} 4 m = 4 * ( (m_min + m_max) * count / 2 ) */
1078 long sum_m = (m_min + m_max) * count;
1079 ncap += 2L * sum_m;
1080 }
1081 }
1082 if (ncap > npix_full)
1083 ncap = npix_full;
1084 return ncap;
1085}
1086
1105static inline double *mass_maps_segment_ptr(int s)
1106{
1107 if (!MassMapSegmentMaps || s < 0 || s >= NMassSheets)
1108 return NULL;
1109 return MassMapSegmentMaps + ((long)s) * MassMapNPIX;
1110}
1111
1112/* Forward decl: returns pole pixel (theta=0) in RING ordering */
1113static inline long mass_maps_axis_pixel_ring(int nside);
1114
1131static void mass_maps_zero_all_maps(void)
1132{
1133 if (!MassMapSegmentMaps)
1134 return;
1135 long total = (long)NMassSheets * MassMapNPIX;
1136 for (long i = 0; i < total; ++i)
1137 MassMapSegmentMaps[i] = 0.0;
1138}
1139
1159void mass_maps_free_maps(void)
1160{
1161 if (MassMapSegmentMaps)
1162 free(MassMapSegmentMaps);
1163 MassMapSegmentMaps = NULL;
1164 if (MassMapReduceBuffer)
1165 free(MassMapReduceBuffer);
1166 MassMapReduceBuffer = NULL;
1167 MassMapNSIDE_current = 0;
1168 MassMapNPIX = 0;
1169}
1170
1201int mass_maps_init_healpix_maps(int nside)
1202{
1203 if (nside <= 0)
1204 return 1;
1205 if (NMassSheets <= 0)
1206 return 1;
1207 if (MassMapSegmentMaps && MassMapNSIDE_current == nside)
1208 return 0; /* already ready */
1209
1210 /* (Re)allocate */
1211 mass_maps_free_maps();
1212 MassMapNSIDE_current = nside;
1213 long npix_full = mass_maps_npix_from_nside(nside);
1214 MassMapNCAP = mass_maps_ncap_from_aperture(nside, params.PLCAperture);
1215#if MASS_MAPS_FULLSKY_OUTPUT
1216 MassMapNPIX = npix_full;
1217#else
1218 MassMapNPIX = MassMapNCAP;
1219#endif
1220 if (MassMapNPIX <= 0)
1221 {
1222 /* Ensure we still have a valid array; keep zero-sized map disabled */
1223 if (!ThisTask)
1224 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS WARNING: computed Ncap=0 for NSIDE=%d, aperture=%.6g deg. Maps disabled.\n", nside, params.PLCAperture);
1225 MassMapNSIDE_current = 0;
1226 MassMapNPIX = 0;
1227 MassMapNCAP = 0;
1228 return 1;
1229 }
1230 long total = (long)NMassSheets * MassMapNPIX;
1231 MassMapSegmentMaps = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * (size_t)total);
1232 if (!MassMapSegmentMaps)
1233 {
1234 if (!ThisTask)
1235 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS ERROR: cannot allocate HEALPix maps (segments=%d npix=%ld total=%ld).\n", NMassSheets, MassMapNPIX, total);
1236 MassMapNSIDE_current = 0;
1237 MassMapNPIX = 0;
1238 MassMapNCAP = 0;
1239 return 1;
1240 }
1241 mass_maps_zero_all_maps();
1242
1243 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)
1244 {
1245 long axis_pix = mass_maps_axis_pixel_ring(nside);
1246 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS: allocated HEALPix maps ORDERING=RING NSIDE=%d fullNPIX=%ld aperture=%.6gdeg Ncap=%ld using_%s npix=%ld segments=%d axis_pix=%ld\n",
1247 fdate(), nside, npix_full, params.PLCAperture, MassMapNCAP,
1248#if MASS_MAPS_FULLSKY_OUTPUT
1249 "FULLSKY",
1250#else
1251 "CAP",
1252#endif
1253 MassMapNPIX, NMassSheets, axis_pix);
1254 }
1255 return 0;
1256}
1257
1258/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
1259/* PLC-oriented basis and pixelization helpers */
1260/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
1261
1285static inline void mass_maps_map_stats(const double *map, long npix,
1286 double *sum_out, double *min_out, double *max_out, long *nnz_out)
1287{
1288 double s = 0.0;
1289 double mn = 0.0;
1290 double mx = 0.0;
1291 long nnz = 0;
1292 if (npix > 0)
1293 {
1294 mn = mx = map[0];
1295 for (long i = 0; i < npix; ++i)
1296 {
1297 double v = map[i];
1298 s += v;
1299 if (v < mn)
1300 mn = v;
1301 if (v > mx)
1302 mx = v;
1303 if (v != 0.0)
1304 nnz++;
1305 }
1306 }
1307 if (sum_out)
1308 *sum_out = s;
1309 if (min_out)
1310 *min_out = mn;
1311 if (max_out)
1312 *max_out = mx;
1313 if (nnz_out)
1314 *nnz_out = nnz;
1315}
1316
1336static inline long mass_maps_axis_pixel_ring(int nside)
1337{
1338 long pix = -1;
1339 ang2pix_ring((long)nside, 0.0, 0.0, &pix); /* theta=0 on PLC axis */
1340 return pix;
1341}
1342
1384static inline int mass_maps_crossing_from_shifted_positions(const double Pprev[3],
1385 const double Pcurr[3],
1386 const double c_phys[3],
1387 double chi_prev,
1388 double chi_curr,
1389 double *alpha_out,
1390 double entry_pos[3])
1391{
1392 /* Distances to PLC center */
1393 double dx0 = Pprev[0] - c_phys[0];
1394 double dy0 = Pprev[1] - c_phys[1];
1395 double dz0 = Pprev[2] - c_phys[2];
1396 double dx1 = Pcurr[0] - c_phys[0];
1397 double dy1 = Pcurr[1] - c_phys[1];
1398 double dz1 = Pcurr[2] - c_phys[2];
1399 double r_prev = sqrt(dx0 * dx0 + dy0 * dy0 + dz0 * dz0);
1400 double r_curr = sqrt(dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1 + dz1 * dz1);
1401 double H_prev = chi_prev - r_prev;
1402 double H_curr = chi_curr - r_curr;
1403 if (!(H_prev > 0.0 && H_curr <= 0.0))
1404 return 0;
1405 double denom = H_prev - H_curr;
1406 if (fabs(denom) < MASS_MAPS_F_EPS)
1407 return 0;
1408 double alpha = H_prev / denom;
1409 if (alpha < 0.0)
1410 alpha = 0.0;
1411 else if (alpha > 1.0)
1412 alpha = 1.0;
1413 if (alpha_out)
1414 *alpha_out = alpha;
1415 if (entry_pos)
1416 {
1417 entry_pos[0] = Pprev[0] + alpha * (Pcurr[0] - Pprev[0]);
1418 entry_pos[1] = Pprev[1] + alpha * (Pcurr[1] - Pprev[1]);
1419 entry_pos[2] = Pprev[2] + alpha * (Pcurr[2] - Pprev[2]);
1420 }
1421 return 1;
1422}
1423
1424/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
1425/* Sub-volume culling helpers (AABB vs PLC shell) */
1426/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
1427
1460static inline void aabb_distance_bounds_to_point(const double minv[3], const double maxv[3], const double c[3], double *dmin_out, double *dmax_out)
1461{
1462 /* d_min: point-to-box distance */
1463 double d2min = 0.0;
1464 for (int a = 0; a < 3; ++a)
1465 {
1466 double da = 0.0;
1467 if (c[a] < minv[a])
1468 da = minv[a] - c[a];
1469 else if (c[a] > maxv[a])
1470 da = c[a] - maxv[a];
1471 d2min += da * da;
1472 }
1473 /* d_max: farthest corner distance */
1474 double d2max = 0.0;
1475 for (int a = 0; a < 3; ++a)
1476 {
1477 double da0 = fabs(minv[a] - c[a]);
1478 double da1 = fabs(maxv[a] - c[a]);
1479 double da = (da0 > da1) ? da0 : da1;
1480 d2max += da * da;
1481 }
1482 if (dmin_out)
1483 *dmin_out = sqrt(d2min);
1484 if (dmax_out)
1485 *dmax_out = sqrt(d2max);
1486}
1487
1519int mass_maps_compute_pixel_from_pos(const double pos[3], int nside, long *pix_out)
1520{
1521 if (!pix_out || nside <= 0)
1522 return 0;
1523 /* Cache center/basis once per process to avoid recomputing in hot paths */
1524 mass_maps_cache_plc_basis_and_center();
1525 double vx = pos[0] - MassMapPLC_CenterPhys[0];
1526 double vy = pos[1] - MassMapPLC_CenterPhys[1];
1527 double vz = pos[2] - MassMapPLC_CenterPhys[2];
1528 double vnorm = sqrt(vx * vx + vy * vy + vz * vz);
1529 if (vnorm == 0.0)
1530 return 0;
1531 double invv = 1.0 / vnorm;
1532 double vhat[3] = {vx * invv, vy * invv, vz * invv};
1533 const double *e1 = MassMapPLC_e1;
1534 const double *e2 = MassMapPLC_e2;
1535 const double *e3 = MassMapPLC_e3;
1536 double cos_theta = vhat[0] * e3[0] + vhat[1] * e3[1] + vhat[2] * e3[2];
1537 if (cos_theta > 1.0)
1538 cos_theta = 1.0;
1539 else if (cos_theta < -1.0)
1540 cos_theta = -1.0;
1541 double theta = acos(cos_theta);
1542 double x1 = vhat[0] * e1[0] + vhat[1] * e1[1] + vhat[2] * e1[2];
1543 double y1 = vhat[0] * e2[0] + vhat[1] * e2[1] + vhat[2] * e2[2];
1544 double phi = atan2(y1, x1);
1545 if (phi < 0.0)
1546 {
1547 double twopi = 2.0 * acos(-1.0);
1548 phi += twopi;
1549 }
1550 long ipix = -1;
1551 /* RING-only ordering */
1552 ang2pix_ring((long)nside, theta, phi, &ipix);
1553 if (ipix < 0)
1554 return 0;
1555 *pix_out = ipix;
1556 return 1;
1557}
1558
1583static inline void mass_maps_accumulate_entry_pos(int s,
1584 const double entry_pos[3],
1585 double weight)
1586{
1587 if (s < 0 || s >= NMassSheets || MassMapNSIDE_current <= 0)
1588 return;
1589 long ipix;
1590 if (!mass_maps_compute_pixel_from_pos(entry_pos, MassMapNSIDE_current, &ipix))
1591 return;
1592 double *map = mass_maps_segment_ptr(s);
1593 if (!map)
1594 return;
1595 if ((unsigned long)ipix < (unsigned long)MassMapNPIX)
1596 map[ipix] += weight;
1597}
1598
1626int mass_maps_write_segment_map(int s)
1627{
1628 if (ThisTask != 0)
1629 return 0;
1630 if (s < 0 || s >= NMassSheets)
1631 return 1;
1632 if (!MassMapSegmentMaps || MassMapNSIDE_current <= 0 || MassMapNPIX <= 0)
1633 return 1;
1634
1635 char fname[3 * LBLENGTH];
1636 snprintf(fname, sizeof(fname), "pinocchio.%s.massmap.seg%03d.fits", params.RunFlag, s);
1637 char fitsname[3 * LBLENGTH + 2];
1638 snprintf(fitsname, sizeof(fitsname), "!%s", fname); /* overwrite if exists */
1639
1640 fitsfile *fptr = NULL;
1641 int status = 0;
1642 long naxes[1];
1643 naxes[0] = MassMapNPIX;
1644 double *map = mass_maps_segment_ptr(s);
1645 if (!map)
1646 return 1;
1647
1648 fits_create_file(fptr ? &fptr : &fptr, fitsname, &status);
1649 if (status)
1650 {
1651 fits_report_error(stderr, status);
1652 return 1;
1653 }
1654 /* Choose output format: full-sky IMAGE or partial-sky BINTABLE (IMPLICIT indexing) */
1655#if MASS_MAPS_FULLSKY_OUTPUT
1656 fits_create_img(fptr, DOUBLE_IMG, 1, naxes, &status);
1657 if (status)
1658 {
1659 fits_report_error(stderr, status);
1660 fits_close_file(fptr, &status);
1661 return 1;
1662 }
1663 {
1664 /* HEALPix metadata */
1665 char pixtype[] = "HEALPIX";
1666 char ordering[] = "RING";
1667 fits_update_key(fptr, TSTRING, "PIXTYPE", pixtype, "HEALPix pixelisation", &status);
1668 fits_update_key(fptr, TSTRING, "ORDERING", ordering, "Pixel ordering scheme (RING/NESTED)", &status);
1669 fits_update_key(fptr, TINT, "NSIDE", &MassMapNSIDE_current, "HEALPix NSIDE", &status);
1670 long firstpix = 0;
1671 long lastpix = MassMapNPIX - 1;
1672 fits_update_key(fptr, TLONG, "FIRSTPIX", &firstpix, "First pixel number (0-based)", &status);
1673 fits_update_key(fptr, TLONG, "LASTPIX", &lastpix, "Last pixel number (0-based)", &status);
1674 /* Additional context */
1675 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "APERTURE", &params.PLCAperture, "PLC cone aperture (deg)", &status);
1676 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "AXISV1", &plc.zvers[0], "PLC axis x-component", &status);
1677 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "AXISV2", &plc.zvers[1], "PLC axis y-component", &status);
1678 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "AXISV3", &plc.zvers[2], "PLC axis z-component", &status);
1679 /* Filter metadata (if available) */
1680 mass_maps_write_filter_keywords(fptr, s);
1681 }
1682 {
1683 /* Write data */
1684 long fpixel = 1; /* FITS 1-based */
1685 long nelem = MassMapNPIX;
1686 fits_write_img(fptr, TDOUBLE, fpixel, nelem, map, &status);
1687 }
1688#else
1689 /* Partial-sky in a binary table; choose EXPLICIT indexing for broad compatibility */
1690 int tfields = 2;
1691 char *ttype[] = {"PIXEL", "SIGNAL"};
1692 char *tform[] = {"1J", "1D"};
1693 char *tunit[] = {"", ""};
1694 long nrows = MassMapNPIX;
1695 fits_create_tbl(fptr, BINARY_TBL, nrows, tfields, ttype, tform, tunit, "HEALPIX", &status);
1696 if (status)
1697 {
1698 fits_report_error(stderr, status);
1699 fits_close_file(fptr, &status);
1700 return 1;
1701 }
1702 {
1703 /* HEALPix metadata */
1704 char pixtype[] = "HEALPIX";
1705 char ordering[] = "RING";
1706 char idxschm[] = "EXPLICIT";
1707 fits_update_key(fptr, TSTRING, "PIXTYPE", pixtype, "HEALPix pixelisation", &status);
1708 fits_update_key(fptr, TSTRING, "ORDERING", ordering, "Pixel ordering scheme (RING)", &status);
1709 fits_update_key(fptr, TINT, "NSIDE", &MassMapNSIDE_current, "HEALPix NSIDE", &status);
1710 fits_update_key(fptr, TSTRING, "INDXSCHM", idxschm, "Indexing: EXPLICIT (PIXEL column)", &status);
1711 /* Explicit indexing: we also include FIRSTPIX/LASTPIX for convenience */
1712 long firstpix = 0;
1713 long lastpix = MassMapNPIX - 1; /* 0..Ncap-1 */
1714 fits_update_key(fptr, TLONG, "FIRSTPIX", &firstpix, "First pixel number (0-based)", &status);
1715 fits_update_key(fptr, TLONG, "LASTPIX", &lastpix, "Last pixel number (0-based)", &status);
1716 /* Context: PLC geometry */
1717 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "APERTURE", &params.PLCAperture, "PLC cone aperture (deg)", &status);
1718 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "AXISV1", &plc.zvers[0], "PLC axis x-component", &status);
1719 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "AXISV2", &plc.zvers[1], "PLC axis y-component", &status);
1720 fits_update_key(fptr, TDOUBLE, "AXISV3", &plc.zvers[2], "PLC axis z-component", &status);
1721 /* Filter metadata (if available) */
1722 mass_maps_write_filter_keywords(fptr, s);
1723 }
1724 {
1725 /* Write columns: PIXEL (0..Ncap-1) and SIGNAL */
1726 long firstrow = 1; /* 1-based */
1727 long firstelem = 1; /* scalar */
1728 long nelements = MassMapNPIX;
1729 /* Build pixel index array */
1730 int *pix_index = (int *)malloc(sizeof(int) * (size_t)MassMapNPIX);
1731 if (!pix_index)
1732 {
1733 fits_report_error(stderr, status);
1734 fits_close_file(fptr, &status);
1735 return 1;
1736 }
1737 for (long i = 0; i < MassMapNPIX; ++i)
1738 pix_index[i] = (int)i;
1739 fits_write_col(fptr, TINT, 1, firstrow, firstelem, nelements, pix_index, &status);
1740 free(pix_index);
1741 fits_write_col(fptr, TDOUBLE, 2, firstrow, firstelem, nelements, map, &status);
1742 }
1743#endif
1744
1745 fits_close_file(fptr, &status);
1746 if (status)
1747 {
1748 fits_report_error(stderr, status);
1749 return 1;
1750 }
1751 if (internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)
1752 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS: wrote %s (NSIDE=%d NPIX=%ld, format=%s)\n", fdate(), fname, MassMapNSIDE_current, MassMapNPIX,
1753#if MASS_MAPS_FULLSKY_OUTPUT
1754 "IMAGE"
1755#else
1756 "BINTABLE"
1757#endif
1758 );
1759 return 0;
1760}
1761
1797int mass_maps_write_sheet_table(void)
1798{
1799 if (ThisTask != 0)
1800 return 0;
1801 if (!MassSheets || NMassSheets <= 0)
1802 return 0;
1803
1804 char fname[2 * LBLENGTH];
1805 snprintf(fname, sizeof(fname), "pinocchio.%s.sheets.out", params.RunFlag);
1806 FILE *fd = fopen(fname, "w");
1807 if (!fd)
1808 {
1809 fprintf(stderr, "Task 0 ERROR: cannot open %s for writing.\n", fname);
1810 return 1;
1811 }
1812 fprintf(fd, "# Mass sheet definitions\n");
1813 fprintf(fd, "# Columns:\n");
1814 fprintf(fd, "# %-3s %-10s %-10s %-10s %-12s %-12s %-12s %-14s %-12s %-12s %-12s\n",
1815 "id", "z_hi", "z_lo", "delta_z", "chi_hi", "chi_lo", "delta_chi", "inv_delta_chi", "da_hi", "da_lo", "chi3_diff");
1816 for (int s = 0; s < NMassSheets; ++s)
1817 {
1818 MassSheet *ms = &MassSheets[s];
1819 fprintf(fd, "%3d %-10.8f %-10.8f %-10.8f %-12.8f %-12.8f %-12.8f %-14.12g %-12.8f %-12.8f %-12.8g\n",
1820 s, ms->z_hi, ms->z_lo, ms->delta_z, ms->chi_hi, ms->chi_lo, ms->delta_chi, ms->inv_dchi, ms->da_hi, ms->da_lo, ms->chi3_diff);
1821 }
1822 fclose(fd);
1823 if (internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)
1824 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS: wrote %s (N=%d)\n", fdate(), fname, NMassSheets);
1825 return 0;
1826}
1827
1828/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
1829/* Auxiliary geometry / crossing utilities (minimal version) */
1830/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
1831
1860static inline void mass_maps_replication_chi_bounds(int rep_id, double *rmin, double *rmax)
1861{
1862 double F1 = plc.repls[rep_id].F1;
1863 double F2 = plc.repls[rep_id].F2;
1864 double z1 = F1 - 1.0;
1865 if (z1 < 0)
1866 z1 = 0;
1867 double z2 = F2 - 1.0;
1868 if (z2 < 0)
1869 z2 = 0;
1870 double chi1 = ComovingDistance(z1);
1871 double chi2 = ComovingDistance(z2);
1872 if (chi1 < chi2)
1873 {
1874 *rmin = chi1;
1875 *rmax = chi2;
1876 }
1877 else
1878 {
1879 *rmin = chi2;
1880 *rmax = chi1;
1881 }
1882}
1883
1920static void mass_maps_select_segment_replications(int segment_index)
1921{
1922 MassMapSegmentReplicationCount = 0;
1923 if (segment_index <= 0)
1924 return; /* first segment has no crossings */
1925 /* Segment spans between previous and current fragmentation redshifts */
1926 double z_prev = ScaleDep.z[segment_index - 1];
1927 double z_curr = ScaleDep.z[segment_index];
1928 /* Convert to chi; ComovingDistance grows with z so chi_prev > chi_curr given descending z array. */
1929 double chi_prev = ComovingDistance(z_prev);
1930 double chi_curr = ComovingDistance(z_curr);
1931 /* Segment radial span is [chi_curr, chi_prev] (chi_prev >= chi_curr). */
1932 double seg_chi_min = (chi_curr < chi_prev) ? chi_curr : chi_prev;
1933 double seg_chi_max = (chi_curr > chi_prev) ? chi_curr : chi_prev;
1934 /* Ensure capacity */
1935 if (MassMapSegmentReplicationsCapacity < plc.Nreplications)
1936 {
1937 int newcap = plc.Nreplications;
1938 int *tmp = (int *)realloc(MassMapSegmentReplications, sizeof(int) * newcap);
1939 if (!tmp)
1940 {
1941 if (!ThisTask)
1942 fprintf(stderr, "MASS_MAPS WARNING: cannot allocate segment replication list (N=%d).\n", plc.Nreplications);
1943 return;
1944 }
1945 MassMapSegmentReplications = tmp;
1946 MassMapSegmentReplicationsCapacity = newcap;
1947 }
1948 for (int r = 0; r < plc.Nreplications; ++r)
1949 {
1950 double rmin, rmax;
1951 mass_maps_replication_chi_bounds(r, &rmin, &rmax);
1952 if (rmax < seg_chi_min || rmin > seg_chi_max)
1953 continue; /* no overlap */
1954 MassMapSegmentReplications[MassMapSegmentReplicationCount++] = r;
1955 }
1956 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
1957 {
1958 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS: segment %d chi-span=[%g,%g] replication candidates=%d/%d\n",
1959 fdate(), segment_index, seg_chi_min, seg_chi_max,
1960 MassMapSegmentReplicationCount, plc.Nreplications);
1961 }
1962}
1963
1964/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
1965/* Displacement / position helpers */
1966/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
1998static inline void mass_maps_compute_prev_curr_positions(const pos_data *p,
1999 double pos_prev[3],
2000 double pos_curr[3],
2001 int order)
2002{
2003 /* Sum displacements per order (endpoints: weights collapse to selecting
2004 either *_prev or current components, so no interpolation weights used). */
2005 for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i)
2006 {
2007 double dp_prev = p->v_prev[i];
2008 double dp_curr = p->v[i];
2009#ifdef TWO_LPT
2010 if (order > 1)
2011 {
2012 dp_prev += p->v2_prev[i];
2013 dp_curr += p->v2[i];
2014 }
2015#ifdef THREE_LPT
2016 if (order > 2)
2017 {
2018 dp_prev += p->v31_prev[i] + p->v32_prev[i];
2019 dp_curr += p->v31[i] + p->v32[i];
2020 }
2021#endif /* THREE_LPT */
2022#endif /* TWO_LPT */
2023 pos_prev[i] = p->q[i] + dp_prev;
2024 pos_curr[i] = p->q[i] + dp_curr;
2025 }
2026 /* Rescale from lattice units (grid cells) to physical box units using InterPartDist. */
2027 double scale = params.InterPartDist; /* typical: BoxSize / GridSize */
2028 pos_prev[0] *= scale;
2029 pos_prev[1] *= scale;
2030 pos_prev[2] *= scale;
2031 pos_curr[0] *= scale;
2032 pos_curr[1] *= scale;
2033 pos_curr[2] *= scale;
2034}
2035
2036/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
2037/* Build pos_data from products (FFT local tile, global coords) */
2038/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
2075static inline void mass_maps_set_point_from_products_global(int ig, int jg, int kg,
2076 PRODFLOAT F,
2077 pos_data *myobj)
2078{
2079 /* Translate global to local FFT indices */
2080 int li = ig - (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_x_];
2081 int lj = jg - (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_y_];
2082 int lk = kg - (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_z_];
2083
2084 /* Safety: bound check (should not trigger if caller iterates tile properly) */
2085 if (li < 0 || lj < 0 || lk < 0 ||
2086 li >= (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_x_] ||
2087 lj >= (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_] ||
2088 lk >= (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_])
2089 {
2090 /* Mark as empty */
2091 myobj->M = 0;
2092 return;
2093 }
2094
2095 unsigned int idx = COORD_TO_INDEX(li, lj, lk, MyGrids[0].GSlocal);
2096
2097 myobj->z = F - 1.0;
2098#ifdef SCALE_DEPENDENT
2099 int S = Smoothing.Nsmooth - 1;
2100 myobj->myk = Smoothing.k_GM_displ[S];
2101#else
2102 myobj->myk = params.k_for_GM;
2103#endif
2104 set_weight(myobj);
2105
2106 myobj->M = 1;
2107 myobj->q[0] = ig + SHIFT;
2108 myobj->q[1] = jg + SHIFT;
2109 myobj->q[2] = kg + SHIFT;
2110 myobj->v[0] = products[idx].Vel[0];
2111 myobj->v[1] = products[idx].Vel[1];
2112 myobj->v[2] = products[idx].Vel[2];
2113#ifdef TWO_LPT
2114 myobj->v2[0] = products[idx].Vel_2LPT[0];
2115 myobj->v2[1] = products[idx].Vel_2LPT[1];
2116 myobj->v2[2] = products[idx].Vel_2LPT[2];
2117#ifdef THREE_LPT
2118 myobj->v31[0] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1[0];
2119 myobj->v31[1] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1[1];
2120 myobj->v31[2] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1[2];
2121 myobj->v32[0] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2[0];
2122 myobj->v32[1] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2[1];
2123 myobj->v32[2] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2[2];
2124#endif
2125#endif
2126
2127#ifdef RECOMPUTE_DISPLACEMENTS
2128 myobj->v_prev[0] = products[idx].Vel_prev[0];
2129 myobj->v_prev[1] = products[idx].Vel_prev[1];
2130 myobj->v_prev[2] = products[idx].Vel_prev[2];
2131#ifdef TWO_LPT
2132 myobj->v2_prev[0] = products[idx].Vel_2LPT_prev[0];
2133 myobj->v2_prev[1] = products[idx].Vel_2LPT_prev[1];
2134 myobj->v2_prev[2] = products[idx].Vel_2LPT_prev[2];
2135#ifdef THREE_LPT
2136 myobj->v31_prev[0] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[0];
2137 myobj->v31_prev[1] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[1];
2138 myobj->v31_prev[2] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[2];
2139 myobj->v32_prev[0] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[0];
2140 myobj->v32_prev[1] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[1];
2141 myobj->v32_prev[2] = products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[2];
2142#endif
2143#endif
2144#endif
2145}
2146
2167#if defined(SNAPSHOT)
2168static inline double mass_maps_get_zacc_global(int ig, int jg, int kg)
2169{
2170 int li = ig - (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_x_];
2171 int lj = jg - (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_y_];
2172 int lk = kg - (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_z_];
2173 if (li < 0 || lj < 0 || lk < 0 || li >= (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_x_] || lj >= (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_] || lk >= (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_])
2174 return -1e30; /* out of range; treat as never collapsed */
2175 unsigned int idx = COORD_TO_INDEX(li, lj, lk, MyGrids[0].GSlocal);
2176 return (double)products[idx].zacc;
2177}
2178
2179/* Accessor for per-particle group_ID using global lattice coords (0 if none) */
2204static inline int mass_maps_get_group_id_global(int ig, int jg, int kg)
2205{
2206 int li = ig - (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_x_];
2207 int lj = jg - (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_y_];
2208 int lk = kg - (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_z_];
2209 if (li < 0 || lj < 0 || lk < 0 || li >= (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_x_] || lj >= (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_] || lk >= (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_])
2210 return 0;
2211 unsigned int idx = COORD_TO_INDEX(li, lj, lk, MyGrids[0].GSlocal);
2212 return products[idx].group_ID;
2213}
2214#endif
2215
2250int mass_maps_particle_sign_change(int rep_id,
2251 const double q[3],
2252 const double disp_prev[3],
2253 const double disp_curr[3],
2254 double z_prev,
2255 double z_curr,
2256 double *alpha_out,
2257 double entry_pos[3])
2258{
2259 if (rep_id < 0 || rep_id >= plc.Nreplications)
2260 return 0;
2261 int ii = plc.repls[rep_id].i;
2262 int jj = plc.repls[rep_id].j;
2263 int kk = plc.repls[rep_id].k;
2264 /* Replication shift in physical units: integer global box counts only (no subbox offsets) */
2265 double Bx = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_] * params.InterPartDist;
2266 double By = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_] * params.InterPartDist;
2267 double Bz = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_] * params.InterPartDist;
2268 double shift[3] = {ii * Bx, jj * By, kk * Bz};
2269
2270 /* If q==0 vector, treat disp_* as absolute positions (already q+dp). Otherwise treat as displacements relative to q. */
2271 int q_is_zero = (q[0] == 0.0 && q[1] == 0.0 && q[2] == 0.0);
2272 double pos_prev[3], pos_curr[3];
2273 if (q_is_zero)
2274 {
2275 pos_prev[0] = disp_prev[0] + shift[0];
2276 pos_prev[1] = disp_prev[1] + shift[1];
2277 pos_prev[2] = disp_prev[2] + shift[2];
2278 pos_curr[0] = disp_curr[0] + shift[0];
2279 pos_curr[1] = disp_curr[1] + shift[1];
2280 pos_curr[2] = disp_curr[2] + shift[2];
2281 }
2282 else
2283 {
2284 pos_prev[0] = q[0] + disp_prev[0] + shift[0];
2285 pos_prev[1] = q[1] + disp_prev[1] + shift[1];
2286 pos_prev[2] = q[2] + disp_prev[2] + shift[2];
2287 pos_curr[0] = q[0] + disp_curr[0] + shift[0];
2288 pos_curr[1] = q[1] + disp_curr[1] + shift[1];
2289 pos_curr[2] = q[2] + disp_curr[2] + shift[2];
2290 }
2291
2292 /* Crossing logic:
2293 Define H_prev = chi_prev - r_prev and H_curr = chi_curr - r_curr.
2294 Crossing occurs if H_prev > 0 and H_curr <= 0. Estimate alpha by
2295 linear interpolation of H between the two endpoints. */
2296 double c0 = plc.center[0] * params.InterPartDist;
2297 double c1 = plc.center[1] * params.InterPartDist;
2298 double c2 = plc.center[2] * params.InterPartDist;
2299 double dxp0 = pos_prev[0] - c0, dyp0 = pos_prev[1] - c1, dzp0 = pos_prev[2] - c2;
2300 double dxp1 = pos_curr[0] - c0, dyp1 = pos_curr[1] - c1, dzp1 = pos_curr[2] - c2;
2301 double r_prev = sqrt(dxp0 * dxp0 + dyp0 * dyp0 + dzp0 * dzp0);
2302 double r_curr = sqrt(dxp1 * dxp1 + dyp1 * dyp1 + dzp1 * dzp1);
2303 double chi_prev = ComovingDistance(z_prev);
2304 double chi_curr = ComovingDistance(z_curr);
2305 double H_prev = chi_prev - r_prev;
2306 double H_curr = chi_curr - r_curr;
2307
2308 /* Early exit if no crossing according to crossing condition */
2309 if (!(H_prev > 0.0 && H_curr <= 0.0))
2310 {
2311 static int sanity_no_cross_prints = 0;
2312 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG && sanity_no_cross_prints < 10)
2313 {
2314 printf("MASS_MAPS SANITY(no-entry): rep=%d z_prev=%.3f z_curr=%.3f H_prev=% .3e H_curr=% .3e r_prev=%.2f r_curr=%.2f chi_prev=%.2f chi_curr=%.2f\n",
2315 rep_id, z_prev, z_curr, H_prev, H_curr, r_prev, r_curr, chi_prev, chi_curr);
2316 sanity_no_cross_prints++;
2317 }
2318 return 0;
2319 }
2320
2321 double denom = H_prev - H_curr;
2322 if (fabs(denom) < MASS_MAPS_F_EPS)
2323 return 0; /* ambiguous, skip */
2324 double alpha = H_prev / denom; /* fraction from prev->curr to crossing */
2325 /* Clamp to [0,1] just in case */
2326 if (alpha < 0.0)
2327 alpha = 0.0;
2328 else if (alpha > 1.0)
2329 alpha = 1.0;
2330
2331 /* Optional sanity print for a few crossings */
2332 {
2333 static int sanity_cross_prints = 0;
2334 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG && sanity_cross_prints < 10)
2335 {
2336 printf("MASS_MAPS SANITY(entry): rep=%d z_prev=%.3f z_curr=%.3f H_prev=% .3e H_curr=% .3e alpha=%.3f r_prev=%.2f r_curr=%.2f\n",
2337 rep_id, z_prev, z_curr, H_prev, H_curr, alpha, r_prev, r_curr);
2338 sanity_cross_prints++;
2339 }
2340 }
2341 if (alpha_out)
2342 *alpha_out = alpha;
2343 if (entry_pos)
2344 {
2345 entry_pos[0] = pos_prev[0] + alpha * (pos_curr[0] - pos_prev[0]);
2346 entry_pos[1] = pos_prev[1] + alpha * (pos_curr[1] - pos_prev[1]);
2347 entry_pos[2] = pos_prev[2] + alpha * (pos_curr[2] - pos_prev[2]);
2348 }
2349 return 1;
2350}
2351
2352/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
2353/* Orchestrator */
2354/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
2409void mass_maps_process_segment(int segment_index, double z_segment, int is_first_segment)
2410{
2411 /* Ensure ZACC values are available in products when filtering uncollapsed-only */
2412#if defined(MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED)
2413#if defined(SNAPSHOT)
2414 {
2415 /* Do back-distribution at EACH segment, as fragmentation updates across segments
2416 can assign new halo memberships and zacc values. This ensures the filter and
2417 matching diagnostics see up-to-date products[].zacc and products[].group_ID. */
2418 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
2419 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS(filter): distributing ZACC/group_ID to products for segment %d\n", fdate(), segment_index);
2420 int rc = distribute_back();
2421 if (rc && !ThisTask)
2422 {
2423 fprintf(stderr, "[%s] MASS_MAPS(filter) WARNING: distribute_back() failed; ZACC may be unset (=-1) and the filter will include all.\n", fdate());
2424 }
2425#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
2426 /* After back-distribution, estimate coverage of group_ID and zacc on this task */
2427 unsigned long long gid_pos_local = 0ULL, zacc_set_local = 0ULL;
2428 unsigned long long gid_pos_global = 0ULL, zacc_set_global = 0ULL;
2429 int nx = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_x_];
2430 int ny = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_];
2431 int nz = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_];
2432 for (int li = 0; li < nx; ++li)
2433 for (int lj = 0; lj < ny; ++lj)
2434 for (int lk = 0; lk < nz; ++lk)
2435 {
2436 unsigned int idx = COORD_TO_INDEX(li, lj, lk, MyGrids[0].GSlocal);
2437 if (products[idx].group_ID > FILAMENT)
2438 gid_pos_local++;
2439 if (products[idx].zacc > -0.5)
2440 zacc_set_local++;
2441 }
2442 MPI_Reduce(&gid_pos_local, &gid_pos_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
2443 MPI_Reduce(&zacc_set_local, &zacc_set_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
2444 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
2445 {
2446 unsigned long long total_local_size = (unsigned long long)MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_] * (unsigned long long)MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_] * (unsigned long long)MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_];
2447 double f_gid = (total_local_size > 0ULL) ? ((double)gid_pos_global / (double)total_local_size) : 0.0;
2448 double f_zacc = (total_local_size > 0ULL) ? ((double)zacc_set_global / (double)total_local_size) : 0.0;
2449 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS(match): products coverage after back-distribution: frac(group_ID>FILAMENT)=%.3f frac(zacc_set)=%.3f\n",
2450 fdate(), f_gid, f_zacc);
2451 }
2452#endif
2453 }
2454#else
2455#error "MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED requires SNAPSHOT"
2456#endif
2457#endif
2458 /* One-time HEALPix map allocator */
2459 {
2460 static int hpix_init_done = 0;
2461 if (!hpix_init_done)
2462 {
2463 if (params.MassMapNSIDE > 0)
2464 mass_maps_init_healpix_maps(params.MassMapNSIDE);
2465 hpix_init_done = 1;
2466 }
2467 }
2468 /* One-time units diagnostic to stdout (debug-level) */
2469 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
2470 {
2471 static int printed_units = 0;
2472 if (!printed_units)
2473 {
2474 double c0 = plc.center[0] * params.InterPartDist;
2475 double c1 = plc.center[1] * params.InterPartDist;
2476 double c2 = plc.center[2] * params.InterPartDist;
2477 double Bx = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_] * params.InterPartDist;
2478 double By = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_] * params.InterPartDist;
2479 double Bz = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_] * params.InterPartDist;
2480 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS units: PLC center (phys)=(%.9g, %.9g, %.9g) InterPartDist=%.9g BoxSize=(%.9g, %.9g, %.9g)\n",
2481 fdate(), c0, c1, c2, params.InterPartDist, Bx, By, Bz);
2482 printed_units = 1;
2483 }
2484 }
2485
2486 if (NMassSheets <= 0 || params.MassMapNSIDE <= 0)
2487 return; /* feature disabled or not initialized */
2488 if (is_first_segment)
2489 return; /* need previous segment for crossings */
2490
2491 /* STEP 1: select replication candidates overlapping this segment radial span */
2492 mass_maps_select_segment_replications(segment_index);
2493
2494 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
2495 {
2496 int show = MassMapSegmentReplicationCount < 10 ? MassMapSegmentReplicationCount : 10;
2497 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS: segment %d z=%g replication candidates %d/%d :",
2498 fdate(), segment_index, z_segment,
2499 MassMapSegmentReplicationCount, plc.Nreplications);
2500 for (int i = 0; i < show; ++i)
2501 printf(" %d", MassMapSegmentReplications[i]);
2502 if (MassMapSegmentReplicationCount > show)
2503 printf(" ...");
2504 printf("\n");
2505 }
2506
2507 /* STEP 2: loop over replications and accumulate entries using products over the FFT tile */
2508 if (MassMapSegmentReplicationCount <= 0)
2509 return;
2510
2511 /* Segment endpoint redshifts */
2512 double z_prev = ScaleDep.z[segment_index - 1];
2513 double z_curr = z_segment; /* expected to be ScaleDep.z[segment_index] */
2514 /* Optional: displacement histogram at endpoints (compile-time, default OFF) */
2515#ifdef DISP_HISTOGRAM
2516 mass_maps_disp_hist_on_segment(segment_index, z_prev, z_curr);
2517#endif
2518 /* Segment chi bounds */
2519 double chi_prev_seg = ComovingDistance(z_prev);
2520 double chi_curr_seg = ComovingDistance(z_curr);
2521 double seg_chi_min = chi_prev_seg < chi_curr_seg ? chi_prev_seg : chi_curr_seg;
2522 double seg_chi_max = chi_prev_seg > chi_curr_seg ? chi_prev_seg : chi_curr_seg;
2523 /* PLC center (phys) */
2524 double c_phys[3] = {plc.center[0] * params.InterPartDist,
2525 plc.center[1] * params.InterPartDist,
2526 plc.center[2] * params.InterPartDist};
2527
2528 /* Determine LPT order compiled in */
2529 int lpt_order = 1;
2530#ifdef TWO_LPT
2531 lpt_order = 2;
2532#ifdef THREE_LPT
2533 lpt_order = 3;
2534#endif
2535#endif
2536
2537 /* We'll count local crossings per replication and reduce globally */
2538 unsigned long long total_crossings_all_reps = 0ULL;
2539 unsigned long long total_crossings_all_reps_global = 0ULL;
2540#ifdef MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED
2541 /* Diagnostics for ZPLC>ZACC filter: count how many entries were considered and excluded */
2542 unsigned long long zfilter_considered_local = 0ULL;
2543 unsigned long long zfilter_excluded_local = 0ULL;
2544 unsigned long long zfilter_considered_global = 0ULL;
2545 unsigned long long zfilter_excluded_global = 0ULL;
2546 /* Extra diagnostics: track ranges of z_plc and z_acc and check z_plc segment consistency */
2547 double zplc_min_local = 1e99, zplc_max_local = -1e99;
2548 double zacc_min_local = 1e99, zacc_max_local = -1e99;
2549 double zplc_min_global = 0.0, zplc_max_global = 0.0;
2550 double zacc_min_global = 0.0, zacc_max_global = 0.0;
2551 unsigned long long zplc_out_of_segment_local = 0ULL;
2552 unsigned long long zplc_out_of_segment_global = 0ULL;
2553#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
2554 /* Matching diagnostics */
2555 unsigned long long excl_with_group_local = 0ULL;
2556 unsigned long long excl_with_plcgroup_local = 0ULL;
2557 unsigned long long cons_with_plcgroup_local = 0ULL;
2558 unsigned long long excl_with_group_global = 0ULL;
2559 unsigned long long excl_with_plcgroup_global = 0ULL;
2560 unsigned long long cons_with_plcgroup_global = 0ULL;
2561#endif
2562#endif
2563 /* Store local per-rep counts to reduce in one shot */
2564 unsigned long long *rep_crossings_local = NULL;
2565 unsigned long long *rep_crossings_global = NULL;
2566 if (MassMapSegmentReplicationCount > 0)
2567 {
2568 rep_crossings_local = (unsigned long long *)calloc(MassMapSegmentReplicationCount, sizeof(unsigned long long));
2569 if (!ThisTask)
2570 rep_crossings_global = (unsigned long long *)calloc(MassMapSegmentReplicationCount, sizeof(unsigned long long));
2571 }
2572
2573 /* Precompute scale factor F for set_point (1+z at current segment) */
2574 PRODFLOAT Fseg = (PRODFLOAT)(z_segment + 1.0);
2575
2576 /* Optional: Lagrangian sub-volume culling setup (compile-time controlled) */
2577 int blocks_x = MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_X;
2578 int blocks_y = MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_Y;
2579 int blocks_z = MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_Z;
2580 /* Unified AABB pad (phys units, same units as InterPartDist = true Mpc):
2581 Variable buffer based on (sigma8, z). We use the empirical form
2582 aabb_pad_phys = FACTOR * (sigma8/0.8)^{1.5} / (1+z)
2583 which is independent of resolution and in true Mpc to match positions formed by
2584 multiplying lattice coordinates by InterPartDist (true Mpc).
2585 */
2586 double aabb_pad_phys = 0.0;
2587 {
2588 double sigma8 = params.Sigma8;
2589 double z_now = z_curr; /* current segment redshift */
2590 double factor = MASS_MAPS_VARPAD_FACTOR;
2591 double h = params.Hubble100;
2592 /* Model defined in Mpc/h: pad_h = factor * (sigma8/0.8)^{1.5} / (1+z).
2593 Convert to true Mpc for internal positions by dividing by h. */
2594 aabb_pad_phys = (factor * pow(sigma8 / 0.8, 1.5) / (1.0 + z_now)) / (h > 0.0 ? h : 1.0); /* true Mpc */
2595 }
2596 /* Per-thread HEALPix accumulators: compile-time toggle */
2597#ifdef MASS_MAPS_THREAD_ACCUM
2598 int thread_accum = 1;
2599#else
2600 int thread_accum = 0;
2601#endif
2602 /* Precompute cos(aperture) for conservative angular culling */
2603 double A = params.PLCAperture;
2604 double cosA = cos(A * (acos(-1.0) / 180.0));
2605 int nx_local = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_x_];
2606 int ny_local = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_];
2607 int nz_local = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_];
2608 int gx_start = (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_x_];
2609 int gy_start = (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_y_];
2610 int gz_start = (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_z_];
2611 /* Cap blocks to local sizes */
2612 if (blocks_x > nx_local)
2613 blocks_x = nx_local;
2614 if (blocks_y > ny_local)
2615 blocks_y = ny_local;
2616 if (blocks_z > nz_local)
2617 blocks_z = nz_local;
2618 int culling_enabled = (blocks_x > 0 && blocks_y > 0 && blocks_z > 0);
2619 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)
2620 {
2621 double pad_cells = (params.InterPartDist > 0.0) ? (aabb_pad_phys / params.InterPartDist) : 0.0;
2622 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS culling: blocks=(%d,%d,%d) aabb_pad=%.3g Mpc (%.3g cells) enabled=%d (Lagrangian-only)\n",
2623 fdate(), blocks_x, blocks_y, blocks_z, aabb_pad_phys, pad_cells, culling_enabled);
2624 }
2625
2626 /* Last-segment displacement vs buffer diagnostics threshold */
2627 double warn_frac = MASS_MAPS_VARPAD_WARN_FRAC;
2628 int last_segment = (segment_index == NMassSheets);
2629 int collect_disp_stats = (last_segment && (aabb_pad_phys > 0.0));
2630 unsigned long long disp_total_local = 0ULL; /* number of particles evaluated */
2631 unsigned long long disp_exceed_local = 0ULL; /* number with |Pcurr-Pprev| > AABB pad */
2632 double disp_max_local = 0.0; /* maximum |Pcurr-Pprev| observed */
2633 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)
2634 {
2635 if (aabb_pad_phys > 0.0)
2636 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS culling: using unified AABB pad phys=%.6g\n", fdate(), aabb_pad_phys);
2637 if (collect_disp_stats)
2638 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS buffer-diag: last segment will collect |x(q,z)-q| stats vs buffer pad=%.6g Mpc (%.6g cells) (warn frac=%.3g)\n",
2639 fdate(), aabb_pad_phys, (aabb_pad_phys / params.InterPartDist), warn_frac);
2640 }
2641 /* Build block edge indices in local coordinates (inclusive ranges per block) */
2642 int *edge_x = NULL, *edge_y = NULL, *edge_z = NULL;
2643 int nbx = 0, nby = 0, nbz = 0;
2644 if (culling_enabled)
2645 {
2646 nbx = blocks_x;
2647 nby = blocks_y;
2648 nbz = blocks_z;
2649 edge_x = (int *)malloc(sizeof(int) * (size_t)(nbx + 1));
2650 edge_y = (int *)malloc(sizeof(int) * (size_t)(nby + 1));
2651 edge_z = (int *)malloc(sizeof(int) * (size_t)(nbz + 1));
2652 if (!edge_x || !edge_y || !edge_z)
2653 {
2654 culling_enabled = 0;
2655 }
2656 else
2657 {
2658 for (int b = 0; b <= nbx; ++b)
2659 edge_x[b] = (int)((long)b * (long)nx_local / (long)nbx);
2660 for (int b = 0; b <= nby; ++b)
2661 edge_y[b] = (int)((long)b * (long)ny_local / (long)nby);
2662 for (int b = 0; b <= nbz; ++b)
2663 edge_z[b] = (int)((long)b * (long)nz_local / (long)nbz);
2664 }
2665 }
2666
2667 /* Precompute box shifts for all replication candidates once
2668 * Rationale: avoids recomputing (ii,jj,kk)*Box for every particle.
2669 */
2670 double Bx = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_] * params.InterPartDist;
2671 double By = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_] * params.InterPartDist;
2672 double Bz = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_] * params.InterPartDist;
2673 double *RepShift = NULL;
2674 if (MassMapSegmentReplicationCount > 0)
2675 {
2676 RepShift = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * 3 * (size_t)MassMapSegmentReplicationCount);
2677 if (RepShift)
2678 {
2679 for (int ir = 0; ir < MassMapSegmentReplicationCount; ++ir)
2680 {
2681 int rep_id = MassMapSegmentReplications[ir];
2682 int ii = plc.repls[rep_id].i;
2683 int jj = plc.repls[rep_id].j;
2684 int kk = plc.repls[rep_id].k;
2685 RepShift[3 * ir + 0] = ii * Bx;
2686 RepShift[3 * ir + 1] = jj * By;
2687 RepShift[3 * ir + 2] = kk * Bz;
2688 }
2689 }
2690 }
2691
2692 /* Culling-enabled path: iterate blocks first to reuse particle positions across replications
2693 * Hotspot: the inner loops over particles and replications are dominant.
2694 * Current approach uses a per-block cache of positions to reduce recomputation
2695 * and OpenMP over blocks. Map updates default to atomics; an optional per-thread
2696 * accumulator (MASS_MAPS_THREAD_ACCUM) further reduces contention with a final merge.
2697 */
2698 if (culling_enabled && RepShift)
2699 {
2700 int s_map = segment_index - 1;
2701 /* Diagnostics: track block visitation effectiveness */
2702 long long blocks_total = (long long)nbx * (long long)nby * (long long)nbz;
2703 long long blocks_init_count = 0; /* blocks with any particles (AABB initialized) */
2704 long long blocks_skipped_shell = 0; /* initialized blocks rejected by shell test for all reps */
2705 long long blocks_visited = 0; /* initialized blocks with at least one passing replication */
2706 /* Parallelize over blocks; each iteration handles one block fully */
2707#ifdef _OPENMP
2708#pragma omp parallel for collapse(3) schedule(dynamic)
2709#endif
2710 for (int bz = 0; bz < nbz; ++bz)
2711 for (int by = 0; by < nby; ++by)
2712 for (int bx_i = 0; bx_i < nbx; ++bx_i)
2713 {
2714 int kg0_local = edge_z[bz];
2715 int kg1_local = edge_z[bz + 1] - 1;
2716 if (kg1_local < kg0_local)
2717 continue;
2718 int kg0 = gz_start + kg0_local;
2719 int kg1 = gz_start + kg1_local;
2720 int jg0_local = edge_y[by];
2721 int jg1_local = edge_y[by + 1] - 1;
2722 if (jg1_local < jg0_local)
2723 continue;
2724 int jg0 = gy_start + jg0_local;
2725 int jg1 = gy_start + jg1_local;
2726 int ig0_local = edge_x[bx_i];
2727 int ig1_local = edge_x[bx_i + 1] - 1;
2728 if (ig1_local < ig0_local)
2729 continue;
2730 int ig0 = gx_start + ig0_local;
2731 int ig1 = gx_start + ig1_local;
2732 /* Determine whether this block has content to consider */
2733 int block_initialized = 1; /* Lagrangian-only: any non-empty index range is considered initialized */
2734 if (!block_initialized)
2735 continue;
2736#ifdef _OPENMP
2737#pragma omp atomic update
2738#endif
2739 blocks_init_count++;
2740
2741 /* Per-block buffer threshold for diagnostics */
2742 double scale_block = params.InterPartDist;
2743 double thresh_block = aabb_pad_phys;
2744
2745 /* Build replication pass list for this block */
2746 int *rep_pass = (int *)alloca(sizeof(int) * (size_t)MassMapSegmentReplicationCount);
2747 int pass_n = 0;
2748 for (int ir = 0; ir < MassMapSegmentReplicationCount; ++ir)
2749 {
2750 const double *shift = &RepShift[3 * ir];
2751 /* Lagrangian AABB expanded by unified pad (phys units) */
2752 double min_s[3] = {(ig0 + SHIFT) * scale_block, (jg0 + SHIFT) * scale_block, (kg0 + SHIFT) * scale_block};
2753 double max_s[3] = {(ig1 + SHIFT) * scale_block, (jg1 + SHIFT) * scale_block, (kg1 + SHIFT) * scale_block};
2754 /* Effective AABB padding (variable): use per-segment aabb_pad_phys only */
2755 double thresh_block = aabb_pad_phys;
2756 double pad_total = aabb_pad_phys;
2757 for (int a = 0; a < 3; ++a)
2758 {
2759 min_s[a] -= pad_total;
2760 max_s[a] += pad_total;
2761 min_s[a] += shift[a];
2762 max_s[a] += shift[a];
2763 }
2764 double dmin, dmax;
2765 aabb_distance_bounds_to_point(min_s, max_s, c_phys, &dmin, &dmax);
2766 if (dmin > seg_chi_max || dmax < seg_chi_min)
2767 continue; /* radial shell rejects */
2768 /* Conservative angular cull using cosine upper bound:
2769 If max_{box} (u·r/|r|) ≤ cosA, the whole AABB is outside aperture.
2770 Upper bound <= (max_u_dot) / (min_norm). */
2771 double u[3] = {plc.zvers[0], plc.zvers[1], plc.zvers[2]}; /* unit axis */
2772 /* Build relative bounds r = x - c */
2773 double rmin[3] = {min_s[0] - c_phys[0], min_s[1] - c_phys[1], min_s[2] - c_phys[2]};
2774 double rmax[3] = {max_s[0] - c_phys[0], max_s[1] - c_phys[1], max_s[2] - c_phys[2]};
2775 /* max_u_dot: choose per-axis extreme based on sign of u */
2776 double max_u_dot = 0.0;
2777 for (int a = 0; a < 3; ++a)
2778 {
2779 double ra = (u[a] >= 0.0) ? rmax[a] : rmin[a];
2780 max_u_dot += u[a] * ra;
2781 }
2782 /* min_norm = dmin from center to AABB; if center inside (dmin==0), skip angular culling */
2783 int angular_pass = 1;
2784 if (dmin > 0.0)
2785 {
2786 double cos_ub = max_u_dot / dmin;
2787 if (cos_ub <= cosA)
2788 angular_pass = 0; /* definitely outside aperture */
2789 }
2790 if (!angular_pass)
2791 continue;
2792 rep_pass[pass_n++] = ir;
2793 }
2794 if (pass_n == 0)
2795 {
2796#ifdef _OPENMP
2797#pragma omp atomic update
2798#endif
2799 blocks_skipped_shell++;
2800 continue; /* no replication needs this block */
2801 }
2802#ifdef _OPENMP
2803#pragma omp atomic update
2804#endif
2805 blocks_visited++;
2806
2807 /* Prepare buffers for this block's particles (thread-local) */
2808 long nx = (long)(ig1 - ig0 + 1);
2809 long ny = (long)(jg1 - jg0 + 1);
2810 long nz = (long)(kg1 - kg0 + 1);
2811 long nblock = nx * ny * nz;
2812 if (nblock <= 0)
2813 continue;
2814 double *PosPrevBuf = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * 3 * (size_t)nblock);
2815 double *PosCurrBuf = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * 3 * (size_t)nblock);
2816 /* Optional per-thread accumulator for this block to reduce atomics */
2817 double *LocalMap = NULL;
2818 if (thread_accum && MassMapNSIDE_current > 0)
2819 LocalMap = (double *)calloc((size_t)MassMapNPIX, sizeof(double));
2820 unsigned long long ipix_oob_local = 0ULL; /* guard counter */
2821 int use_cache = (PosPrevBuf && PosCurrBuf);
2822 if (use_cache)
2823 {
2824 /* Fill cached positions once */
2825 long idx = 0;
2826 /* Per-block diagnostics */
2827 unsigned long long blk_total = 0ULL, blk_exceed = 0ULL;
2828 double blk_max = 0.0;
2829 for (int ig = ig0; ig <= ig1; ++ig)
2830 {
2831 for (int jg = jg0; jg <= jg1; ++jg)
2832 {
2833 for (int kg = kg0; kg <= kg1; ++kg, ++idx)
2834 {
2835 pos_data obj;
2836 mass_maps_set_point_from_products_global(ig, jg, kg, Fseg, &obj);
2837 if (obj.M == 0)
2838 {
2839 /* Mark as zero-length by duplicating prev/curr */
2840 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 0] = PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 1] = PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 2] = 0.0;
2841 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 0] = PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 1] = PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 2] = 0.0;
2842 continue;
2843 }
2844 double pprev[3], pcurr[3];
2845 mass_maps_compute_prev_curr_positions(&obj, pprev, pcurr, lpt_order);
2846 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 0] = pprev[0];
2847 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 1] = pprev[1];
2848 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 2] = pprev[2];
2849 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 0] = pcurr[0];
2850 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 1] = pcurr[1];
2851 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 2] = pcurr[2];
2852 if (collect_disp_stats)
2853 {
2854 /* Displacement relative to Lagrangian position q */
2855 double qx = (ig + SHIFT) * scale_block;
2856 double qy = (jg + SHIFT) * scale_block;
2857 double qz = (kg + SHIFT) * scale_block;
2858 double dx = pcurr[0] - qx;
2859 double dy = pcurr[1] - qy;
2860 double dz = pcurr[2] - qz;
2861 double d = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
2862 blk_total++;
2863 if (d > thresh_block)
2864 blk_exceed++;
2865 if (d > blk_max)
2866 blk_max = d;
2867 }
2868 }
2869 }
2870 }
2871 if (collect_disp_stats)
2872 {
2873#ifdef _OPENMP
2874#pragma omp atomic update
2875#endif
2876 disp_total_local += blk_total;
2877#ifdef _OPENMP
2878#pragma omp atomic update
2879#endif
2880 disp_exceed_local += blk_exceed;
2881#ifdef _OPENMP
2882#pragma omp critical
2883#endif
2884 {
2885 if (blk_max > disp_max_local)
2886 disp_max_local = blk_max;
2887 }
2888 }
2889
2890 /* Use cached positions for each passing replication */
2891 for (int ip = 0; ip < pass_n; ++ip)
2892 {
2893 int ir = rep_pass[ip];
2894 const double *shift = &RepShift[3 * ir];
2895 unsigned long long local_cross = 0ULL;
2896 long idx2 = 0;
2897 for (int ig = ig0; ig <= ig1; ++ig)
2898 {
2899 for (int jg = jg0; jg <= jg1; ++jg)
2900 {
2901 for (int kg = kg0; kg <= kg1; ++kg, ++idx2)
2902 {
2903 double Pprev[3] = {PosPrevBuf[3 * idx2 + 0] + shift[0],
2904 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx2 + 1] + shift[1],
2905 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx2 + 2] + shift[2]};
2906 double Pcurr[3] = {PosCurrBuf[3 * idx2 + 0] + shift[0],
2907 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx2 + 1] + shift[1],
2908 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx2 + 2] + shift[2]};
2909 /* Skip if empty marked */
2910 if (Pprev[0] == 0.0 && Pprev[1] == 0.0 && Pprev[2] == 0.0 &&
2911 Pcurr[0] == 0.0 && Pcurr[1] == 0.0 && Pcurr[2] == 0.0)
2912 continue;
2913 double entry_pos[3];
2914 if (!mass_maps_crossing_from_shifted_positions(Pprev, Pcurr, c_phys, chi_prev_seg, chi_curr_seg, NULL, entry_pos))
2915 continue;
2916 /* Angular aperture: only accumulate entries inside PLC cone */
2917 if (!mass_maps_entry_inside_aperture(entry_pos))
2918 continue;
2919#ifdef MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED
2920 {
2921 /* Filter: include only if ZPLC > ZACC */
2922 double dx = entry_pos[0] - c_phys[0];
2923 double dy = entry_pos[1] - c_phys[1];
2924 double dz = entry_pos[2] - c_phys[2];
2925 double r_entry = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
2926 double z_plc = InverseComovingDistance(r_entry);
2927#ifdef SNAPSHOT
2928 double z_acc = mass_maps_get_zacc_global(ig, jg, kg);
2929#ifdef _OPENMP
2930#pragma omp atomic update
2931#endif
2932 zfilter_considered_local++;
2933 /* Track min/max and consistency for debug */
2934#ifdef _OPENMP
2935#pragma omp critical
2936#endif
2937 {
2938 if (z_plc < zplc_min_local)
2939 zplc_min_local = z_plc;
2940 if (z_plc > zplc_max_local)
2941 zplc_max_local = z_plc;
2942 if (z_acc < zacc_min_local)
2943 zacc_min_local = z_acc;
2944 if (z_acc > zacc_max_local)
2945 zacc_max_local = z_acc;
2946 }
2947 {
2948 /* Check that z_plc lies within this segment bounds (tolerance at edges) */
2949 double zmin_seg = (z_prev < z_curr) ? z_prev : z_curr;
2950 double zmax_seg = (z_prev > z_curr) ? z_prev : z_curr;
2951 double tol = 1e-3;
2952 if (z_plc < zmin_seg - tol || z_plc > zmax_seg + tol)
2953 {
2954#ifdef _OPENMP
2955#pragma omp atomic update
2956#endif
2957 zplc_out_of_segment_local++;
2958 }
2959 }
2960 if (!(z_plc > z_acc))
2961 {
2962#ifdef _OPENMP
2963#pragma omp atomic update
2964#endif
2965 zfilter_excluded_local++;
2966 continue;
2967 }
2968#else
2969#error "MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED requires SNAPSHOT"
2970#endif
2971 }
2972#endif
2973 local_cross++;
2974 if (s_map >= 0 && s_map < NMassSheets && MassMapNSIDE_current > 0)
2975 {
2976 long ipix;
2977 if (mass_maps_compute_pixel_from_pos(entry_pos, MassMapNSIDE_current, &ipix))
2978 {
2979 if ((unsigned long)ipix < (unsigned long)MassMapNPIX)
2980 {
2981 if (LocalMap)
2982 {
2983 LocalMap[ipix] += 1.0;
2984 }
2985 else
2986 {
2987 double *map = mass_maps_segment_ptr(s_map);
2988#ifdef _OPENMP
2989#pragma omp atomic update
2990#endif
2991 map[ipix] += 1.0;
2992 }
2993 }
2994 else
2995 {
2996 ipix_oob_local++;
2997 }
2998 }
2999 }
3000 }
3001 }
3002 }
3003 /* Thread-safe global counters */
3004#ifdef _OPENMP
3005#pragma omp atomic update
3006#endif
3007 total_crossings_all_reps += local_cross;
3008 if (rep_crossings_local)
3009 {
3010#ifdef _OPENMP
3011#pragma omp atomic update
3012#endif
3013 rep_crossings_local[ir] += local_cross;
3014 }
3015 }
3016 }
3017 else
3018 {
3019 /* No cache available: compute per particle per passing replication */
3020 /* Per-block diagnostics */
3021 unsigned long long blk_total = 0ULL, blk_exceed = 0ULL;
3022 double blk_max = 0.0;
3023 for (int ip = 0; ip < pass_n; ++ip)
3024 {
3025 int ir = rep_pass[ip];
3026 const double *shift = &RepShift[3 * ir];
3027 unsigned long long local_cross = 0ULL;
3028 for (int ig = ig0; ig <= ig1; ++ig)
3029 {
3030 for (int jg = jg0; jg <= jg1; ++jg)
3031 {
3032 for (int kg = kg0; kg <= kg1; ++kg)
3033 {
3034 pos_data obj;
3035 mass_maps_set_point_from_products_global(ig, jg, kg, Fseg, &obj);
3036 if (obj.M == 0)
3037 continue;
3038 double pos_prev[3], pos_curr[3];
3039 mass_maps_compute_prev_curr_positions(&obj, pos_prev, pos_curr, lpt_order);
3040 if (collect_disp_stats && ip == 0)
3041 {
3042 double qx = (ig + SHIFT) * scale_block;
3043 double qy = (jg + SHIFT) * scale_block;
3044 double qz = (kg + SHIFT) * scale_block;
3045 double dx = pos_curr[0] - qx;
3046 double dy = pos_curr[1] - qy;
3047 double dz = pos_curr[2] - qz;
3048 double d = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
3049 blk_total++;
3050 if (d > thresh_block)
3051 blk_exceed++;
3052 if (d > blk_max)
3053 blk_max = d;
3054 }
3055 double Pprev[3] = {pos_prev[0] + shift[0], pos_prev[1] + shift[1], pos_prev[2] + shift[2]};
3056 double Pcurr[3] = {pos_curr[0] + shift[0], pos_curr[1] + shift[1], pos_curr[2] + shift[2]};
3057 double entry_pos[3];
3058 if (!mass_maps_crossing_from_shifted_positions(Pprev, Pcurr, c_phys, chi_prev_seg, chi_curr_seg, NULL, entry_pos))
3059 continue;
3060 /* Angular aperture: only accumulate entries inside PLC cone */
3061 if (!mass_maps_entry_inside_aperture(entry_pos))
3062 continue;
3063#ifdef MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED
3064 {
3065 double dx = entry_pos[0] - c_phys[0];
3066 double dy = entry_pos[1] - c_phys[1];
3067 double dz = entry_pos[2] - c_phys[2];
3068 double r_entry = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
3069 double z_plc = InverseComovingDistance(r_entry);
3070#ifdef SNAPSHOT
3071 double z_acc = mass_maps_get_zacc_global(ig, jg, kg);
3072#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
3073 int gid = mass_maps_get_group_id_global(ig, jg, kg);
3074 if (gid > 0 && mass_maps_group_in_plc_by_id(gid))
3075 {
3076 cons_with_plcgroup_local++;
3077 }
3078#endif
3079#ifdef _OPENMP
3080#pragma omp atomic update
3081#endif
3082 zfilter_considered_local++;
3083 /* Track min/max and consistency for debug */
3084#ifdef _OPENMP
3085#pragma omp critical
3086#endif
3087 {
